---
applyTo: "src/app/**/*.tsx,src/app/**/*.ts"
description: "Apply Next.js App Router conventions for route structure, navigation, and API endpoints."
---

# Next.js Routing Rules

Apply these rules for routing-related work:

- Follow App Router conventions in the src/app structure.
- Keep route folder naming and nesting consistent and predictable.
- Use Link for internal navigation.
- Keep API route handlers in app/api with clear route boundaries.
- Use dynamic route segments only when needed and keep parameter naming clear.
- Keep route-level components focused and move shared UI into components.
